wine_bars.name: Vincafe
wine_bars.address: Via Vittorio Emanuele 12, 12051 Alba CN, Italy
wine_bars.wine_program: Langhe-anchored by-the-glass programme rotating Barolo, Barbaresco, Nebbiolo d'Alba and Roero Arneis, with a broader bottle list of Piedmont producers and a coffee-and-vermouth counter
wine_bars.description: Wine bar and cafe on Alba's main pedestrian street pouring a rotating Langhe selection by the glass. Counter seating with truffle and cheese plates designed to anchor the Nebbiolo-led list.

wine_bars.name: Vineria Verso
wine_bars.address: Via San Paolo 20, 10138 Torino TO, Italy
wine_bars.wine_program: Around 200 Italian and international labels with a natural and small-grower leaning, plus vermouth, amari and gin; rotating by-the-glass list with kitchen plates for dinner
wine_bars.description: Neighbourhood vineria in Turin's Cenisia and San Paolo districts with roughly 200 labels leaning natural and small-grower. By-the-glass rotation alongside vermouth and amari with a short bistro menu.

wine_bars.name: Antica Torino
wine_bars.address: Piazza Vittorio Veneto 12, 10123 Torino TO, Italy
wine_bars.wine_program: Vermouth-led aperitivo programme built on house Vermouth di Torino rosso and dry plus a Piedmont wine selection; the bar doubles as the producer's own Turin tasting room
wine_bars.description: Aperitivo bar on Piazza Vittorio Veneto from the Antica Torino vermouth house, serving its own Vermouth di Torino alongside a Piedmont wine list. A working showcase for the brand's revived recipes.

wine_bars.name: Bar Cavour
wine_bars.wine_program: Cellar bar of the Del Cambio restaurant with a deep Piedmont and international wine list; vermouth-forward aperitivo and cocktail programme in an intimate first-floor room
wine_bars.description: The evening bar of the historic Del Cambio restaurant, set above Piazza Carignano. Vermouth-driven aperitivo and a Piedmont-strong wine list in a sophisticated, dimly-lit room.

wine_bars.name: Caffe Mulassano
wine_bars.wine_program: Historic cafe aperitivo built on its own house Liquore delle Alpi vermouth and a short Piedmont wine list, served under the Piazza Castello porticoes with tramezzini
wine_bars.description: Art Nouveau cafe under the Piazza Castello arcades, operating on this site since 1907 and a cradle of Turin aperitivo. Its house vermouth dates to an 1879 recipe; served with the cafe's signature tramezzini.

wine_bars.name: Il Vermuttino
wine_bars.address: Via Franco Bonelli 16/C, 10122 Torino TO, Italy
wine_bars.wine_program: Vermouth specialist in the Quadrilatero pouring a curated list of Vermouth di Torino brands including Cocchi and Antica Torino, plus Piedmont wines by the glass for aperitivo
wine_bars.description: Small Quadrilatero Romano bar built as a tribute to Turin's vermouth tradition, lining up the city's leading Vermouth di Torino brands. Aperitivo-focused with a tight Piedmont wine selection.

wine_bars.name: Enoteca Grandi Vini
wine_bars.address: Via Vittorio Emanuele II 17, 12051 Alba CN, Italy
wine_bars.wine_program: Langhe and Roero specialist with a strong Barolo and Barbaresco bottle list and a tasting counter; by-the-glass selections of Nebbiolo, Barbera and Arneis with local food pairings
wine_bars.description: Central Alba enoteca and tasting counter focused on Langhe and Roero producers, with a deep Barolo and Barbaresco shelf. Glass pours of local Nebbiolo, Barbera and Arneis matched to regional plates.

wine_bars.name: Uve Rooms and Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: Via Umberto I 13, 12064 La Morra CN, Italy
wine_bars.wine_program: La Morra wine bar inside a former convent, pouring a Barolo-focused list of local cru producers by the glass with a kitchen built around Langhe pairings
wine_bars.description: Wine bar in the former 18th-century San Sebastiano convent in La Morra, with a Barolo-led by-the-glass list drawn from local cru producers. Pairing plates of Langhe classics in a vaulted room.
